positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_du_maurier
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    person_in_tie(sK1,sK0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    steinhauer != descampe).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    six_way_tie(sK0)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~person_in_tie(descampe,X0) | ~on_leaderboard(X0,du_maurier_1992) | ~six_way_tie(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    winner_of(du_maurier_1992) = steinhauer).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    on_leaderboard(sK0,du_maurier_1992)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define on_leaderboard_person(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define participated(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define from(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
